evals.prompt: Add a comment feature to the article detail page where readers can post comments and the author can reply.
evals.expected_output: A Gherkin .feature file in docs/ covering happy path (post comment, reply), error paths (empty content, character limit), and edge cases. Uses business language, not technical implementation details.

evals.prompt: I need a user avatar upload feature. Users should be able to upload a profile picture, crop it, and see it on their profile page. Also need to handle cases where the file is too big or not an image.
evals.expected_output: A Gherkin .feature file in docs/ covering upload, crop, display on profile, file size error, and invalid file type error. Business-focused language.

evals.prompt: Build a dark mode toggle for the app. When the user clicks the moon icon in the header, the entire app should switch to a dark color scheme.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger (pure visual change, no behavior change). If triggered, should decline or produce minimal output indicating this is a visual-only change.
